name: CVC Limited
summary: CVC Limited is a venture capital and private equity firm specializing in seed/startup, early venture, mid venture, late venture, emerging growth, mezzanine, and growth capital investments. It prefers to invests in fintech sector. The firm is providing investment capital to companies that engage in financing, property related investments, and packaging supplies in Australia. It operates through Private Equity and Venture Capital, and Property segments. Private Equity and Venture Capital segment invests in equity and debt investments in non-listed entities. The firm will typically invest amounts in the range of A$1million (0.79 million) to A$15 million ($11.90 million). Property segment comprises joint venture interests in the Chevron Renaissance shopping center, the Bel-Air shops. It was formerly known as Continental Venture Capital Limited. CVC Limited was founded in 1985 and is based in Sydney, Australia.
